scores.name: hardship_handling
scores.reason: No hardship, medical emergency, or emotional distress was mentioned, so there was no opportunity to offer a hardship program. The agent did not violate hardship handling, but this metric is not demonstrated in the transcript.

scores.name: continuity
scores.reason: The conversation is somewhat continuous, but agent_2 repeats the same policy framing multiple times and restates prior information instead of advancing the interaction. The transition from refusal to closure is awkward and repetitive.

scores.name: resolution_quality
scores.reason: The agent correctly stops pushing after the borrower says to stop, which aligns with no harassment. However, it then continues outreach after explicit refusal and repeats options instead of acknowledging the stop and flagging the account. It also improperly says 'I have your account details,' which risks privacy concerns. The interaction does not move toward an appropriate resolution.
